title: Definitions
doc_html:
§135.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1987, No. 62, §1, eff. June 11, 1987; Acts 1988, No. 455, §1, eff. July 10, 1988; Acts 1990, No. 613, §1; Acts 1990, No. 849, §1, eff. for taxable years after Dec. 31, 1989; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
doc_text:
§135.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
Acts 1987, No. 62, §1, eff. June 11, 1987; Acts 1988, No. 455, §1, eff. July 10, 1988; Acts 1990, No. 613, §1; Acts 1990, No. 849, §1, eff. for taxable years after Dec. 31, 1989; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
